narrative: Iran halts nuclear ceasefire talks and a blowout US ISM manufacturing print drive a geopolitical risk premium — DXY +0.28%; gold higher +0.16%; equities +0.26%; VIX 16.1. USD/JPY firms to 159.62 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry remains the dominant anchor despite rising geopolitical risk premiums. USD/CHF at 0.7866 sees a +300bp carry advantage, though a +11.1pt VRP suggests the options market is paying a steep premium for protection. Watch the BoC rate decision on June 10.
